title: Dark Side
description: a Creature mod based around dark magic users and some other spooky new foes
body:
![Titel Card to show it in the Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6HtEIrUX/images/1fb5530d361ed3b2cad0a61afd951088bf8b935c.png)


---


***a Creature mod based around dark magic users and some other spooky new foes***

 

currently it adds **4 new mobs** the "***Dark Wizard***", the "***Necromancer***", the "***Soul Guardien***" and a new ***WIP Boss, the "Death"*** himself
 

---


**the Dark Wizard**

 
![a Rendering of the Dark Wizard to show it in the Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6HtEIrUX/images/f0da7a6c815bce081823742116740823879835d1.png)


 

"these guys aren't that strong but you shoudn't underestimate their magic capabilities to control their projectiles to follow after you."

***they have 30 HP and shoot magical homing projectiles at you.***

 
**Special Drop:**
Dark Cape
can be worn as armor, completely absorbs a small amount of damage

 
---
 

**the Necromancer**

![a Rendering of the Necromancer to show it in the Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6HtEIrUX/images/d97eb6f87514f4080e7a766d268e3e692b484ec4.png)

 

"these undead mobs will not summon an infinite amount of monster like you might expect no of course not this would be way to annoying, ... so i made it even worse."

***these mobs have 60 HP and will occasionally shoot a projectile at you but that's of course not all it does also aggro all mobs in a big radius around it at whatever it attacks, and empowers most undead mobs around it exept for Necromancers.***

 

**Special Drop:**
Summoning Skull
can be used to teleport a undead mob, that fights for your, at the position you are looking at
it can also be crafted into a block that does the same thing over a longer period of time

 
---
 

**the Soul Guardian**

![a Rendering of the Soul Guardian to show it in the Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6HtEIrUX/images/651c411ad2584e63c0b4b954d3adb234951eab5e.png)

 

"you could say that their behavior is truly soulless but with the countless souls they have already absorbed this would be far from the realty."

***For these wither skeletons souls are nothing more than energie, they have 45 HP and can absorb the soul energie of their enemies to heal themselfs and if something gets to close they can still kick it away with their leg, this melee attack afflicts the wither effect and does quite a bit of knockback.***

 

**Special Drop:**
Soul Heart Crystal
you can absorb soul energie to heal like the Soul Guardian 


---
 

*don't eat the logo*


---

 

***this mod is made with MCreator***

 
---
